title: Sethboiardee Edition Modpack
description: A modpack made for Sethboiardee, his server, and his community
body:
![SethBoiardee Edition Modpack Title Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/713f19162579d68972a032e5c3edfcdb50430f2b.png)
### [Sethboiardee's Discord](https://discord.com/invite/ZgEBCchENs)
## Welcome to the Kitchen!!
This Fabric modpack was made for Sethboiardee, a small youtuber/streamer

### What you can expect to do with this Fabric Modpack:
- Explore, mine, & Craft across bueatiful landscapes with [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) & [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)

- Create and innovate with [Create[Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) and its many addons

- Chat near or far with [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)

- Create culinary masterpeices or make full factory lines with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) and [Create: Food](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-food)

- Map out your surroundings and create waypoints with [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map), and [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)

- Run 300+ Mods without much issue thanks to popular optimization mods [8+ GB Ram Recommended]

[SERVER CLOSED INDEFINITELY]
   
I hope you have the most fun you can, and thank you for stopping by the Kitchen
